source:
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext.jsx'; import { workerApi } from '../api/api.js'; import LoadingSpinner from '../components/LoadingSpinner.jsx'; import { Shield, Banknote, FileText, Bell, TrendingDown, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Clock, AlertTriangle, CloudRain, Activity } from 'lucide-react'; function Dashboard() { const { worker } = useAuth(); const [dashboard, setDashboard] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { fetchDashboard(); }, []); const fetchDashboard = async () => { try { const response = await workerApi.getDashboard(worker.id); setDashboard(response.data); } catch (err) { setError(err.message); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; if (loading) return ; if (error) return
{error}
; if (!dashboard) return null; const formatCurrency = (val) => { if (!val) return '₹0'; return '₹' + Number(val).toLocaleString('en-IN', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 }); }; const getGreeting = () => { const hour = new Date().getHours(); if (hour < 12) return 'Good morning'; if (hour < 17) return 'Good afternoon'; return 'Good evening'; }; return (
{/* Header */}

{getGreeting()}, {dashboard.workerName?.split(' ')[0]} 👋

Here's your insurance overview for today

{/* Quick Actions */}
File Claim View Policies
{/* Hero Alerts: Risk & Weather */}

Active Weather Alert: {worker?.city || 'Your Area'}

Heavy rain expected today based on IMD reports. High risk for food delivery.

Daily Risk Score

7.8 / 10
{/* Primary Metrics */}
{dashboard.activePolicies}
Active Policies
{formatCurrency(dashboard.totalPayouts)}
Total Payouts
{dashboard.totalClaims}
Total Claims
{dashboard.unreadNotifications}
Unread Alerts
{/* Secondary Metrics */}
{dashboard.pendingClaims}
Pending Claims
{dashboard.approvedClaims}
Approved Claims
{dashboard.avgDeliveryDropRate ? Number(dashboard.avgDeliveryDropRate).toFixed(1) + '%' : '0%'}
Avg Drop Rate
{formatCurrency(dashboard.totalEstimatedLoss)}
Est. Income Loss
{/* Charts / Trends */}

Earnings Trend (This Month)

[ Earnings Chart Placeholder ]

Delivery Drop Rate Trend

[ Drop Rate Chart Placeholder ]

{/* Active Policies */}
Active Policies
Browse Plans
{dashboard.policies && dashboard.policies.length > 0 ? (
{dashboard.policies.map((policy) => ( ))}
PlanCoveragePremiumMax PayoutEnd DateStatus
{policy.planName} {policy.coverageType} {formatCurrency(policy.premiumPaid)} {formatCurrency(policy.maxPayout)} {policy.endDate} {policy.status}
) : (

No active policies

Get protected today — browse insurance plans

)}
{/* Recent Claims */}
Recent Claims
View All
{dashboard.recentClaims && dashboard.recentClaims.length > 0 ? (
{dashboard.recentClaims.map((claim) => ( ))}
Claim #PlanEventRisk ScoreAmountStatus
#{claim.id} {claim.planName} {claim.eventType} = 0.7 ? 'risk-high' : Number(claim.riskScore) >= 0.4 ? 'risk-medium' : 'risk-low'}`}> {Number(claim.riskScore).toFixed(2)} {formatCurrency(claim.claimAmount)} {claim.status}
) : (

No claims yet

Claims are automatically triggered by environmental events

)}
); } export default Dashboard;
